place: Bang Po, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Villa with 18m Pool & Treehouse Play Deck
note: Daily breakfast · airport transfers · chef on request
blurb: A three-level hillside villa on Koh Samui's north-west coast with an 18-metre infinity pool and a full 180-degree sweep over Angthong Marine Park and the Five Islands, a retro-styled sunken lounge, a private study opening onto its own pool terrace, and a children's play deck with a treehouse and zip-line.
detail:
Set into the coconut-clad hills above Bang Po on Koh Samui's north-west coast, this three-level villa looks out across the full width of the west coast — Angthong Marine Park, the Five Islands and the sunsets the coastline is known for — from an unbroken 180-degree vantage point. Five en-suite bedrooms open onto sea and mountain views, and the villa is built around an 18-metre infinity pool, a shaded living and dining sala at the pool's edge, a private study with its own pool terrace, and a fully equipped gym.

The main living level holds a low-slung, retro-styled sunken lounge beside a wall-mounted screen, a twelve-seat dining table and a fully fitted show-kitchen with a breakfast bar, all opening onto the pool terrace and the coastline beyond. At one end of the terrace, a covered sala with a built-in barbecue looks straight out over the water — a fixed seat for the island's sunsets. Bedrooms are finished with king or queen beds, flat-screen TVs, built-in wardrobes and personal safes; some have freestanding tubs, and all have indoor-outdoor rain showers. A separate children's play deck with a treehouse, zip-line and trampoline rounds out the grounds, and mountain bikes and kayaks are kept on hand for exploring the coastline beyond them.

Nathon town is about ten minutes away for everyday shopping and dining, with the beach clubs and restaurants around Four Seasons roughly the same distance and Nikki Beach in Lipa Noi about twenty minutes further, all reachable in the villa's included car. The stay comes with a private chef, a dedicated on-site team, daily breakfast and a complimentary airport transfer.

features.l: Angthong Marine Park & Five Islands views
5 en-suite bedrooms, some with soaking tubs
